narrative:
Sagamore Hills Twp C (precinct in Summit County) has 1,123 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.3 percentage points.
